formula.rounding: native cvttss2si / C# truncation toward zero at StatFormula result, then again after affection multiplier

moves.effects: Deals 70 power NONE physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user lunges at the target and strikes with a strong blow.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power NONE physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user lunges at the target and bites with its fangs.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power NONE physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user lunges at the target and slashes with its claws.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Cooldown: 1. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user goes wild to encourage its allies, gaining 2 additional SP for the next three turn cycles.

moves.effects: Deals 65 power ELECTRIC physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user electrifies its claws and attacks the enemy with them, inflicting massive damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: The user startles the target, reducing its Agility.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Cooldown: 1. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 2 cycles.
moves.description: The user warms up, preparing to attack at full force.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Cooldown: 1. Special: For 3 cycles, redirects or influences targeting toward the baited target.
moves.description: The user baits the target, sneaking up on and striking it every time it attacks an ally.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Cooldown: 1. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user generates a breeze that helps the team move, increasing Agility.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Cooldown: 1. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user pats the target to make it more confident, increasing its Defence.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Cooldown: 1. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: The target bursts into tears, which blurs its vision, decreasing its Agility.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Cooldown: 1. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: The target becomes lost in memories of times past, causing its Defence and Special Defence to decrease.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power ELECTRIC physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user charges itself with electricity before lunging at the target, releasing all the energy in one blow.

moves.effects: Deals 50 power GEO physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user hardens its forehead before unleashing a terrifying headbutt on the target.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power AURA special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: The user generates sharp winds that damage the target.

moves.effects: Deals 80 power ANOMALOUS special damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP. Special: Self-hit/recoil flag is TRUE; targets the selected enemy plus adjacent enemies.
moves.description: The user focuses its psychic powers, triggering a splitting headache in the target and those around it.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power DEMON physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user stealthily sneaks up on the target and strikes when it is at its most vulnerable.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power VIRUS special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: The user produces an acid and sprays it on the target, inflicting massive damage.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power FIRE special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a Fire/heat-style secondary effect.
moves.description: The user creates a column of fire that damages the target.

moves.effects: Deals 55 power GEO physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user takes a mighty step forward, sending rock spikes out of the ground that damage the target.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power VIRUS physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user strikes the target with a kick that leaves a foul smell.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power ICE physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: The user creates an icy spear, piercing the target and reducing its SP by 1.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power ELECTRIC special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: The user charges itself before delivering a strong electric shock to the target.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Cooldown: 1. Heal: restores HP to the target equal to 25% of the user's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: The user produces a sweet, honey-like substance that slightly heals the target.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user hardens every part of its body, increasing its Defence.

moves.effects: Deals 35 power NONE special damage to one chosen battler. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Damage increases each time this move is used.
moves.description: The user shouts randomly, damaging the target. The skill's power increases with each use.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Heal: restores 50% of the target's Max HP immediately, then 15% of the target's Max HP per turn cycle for 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user gathers natural energy to heal an ally. The effect lasts for three turn cycles after use, diminishing over time.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all battlers. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Affects all battlers; converts 2 weaknesses into resistances and also deals damage. Includes recoil/self-hit damage.
moves.description: The user fires a bacterial and viral substance to forcibly vaccinate Animon in battle, causing damage and turning two weaknesses into resistances.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Heal: restores HP to the user equal to 15% of the user's Max HP when this end-of-turn effect resolves.

Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Heal: restores HP to the user equal to 30% of the user's Max HP when this end-of-turn effect resolves.
Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting the user and adjacent allies. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Heal: restores HP to each target equal to 40% of the user's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: The user generates a heat that can heal its own injuries and those of adjacent Animon.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Deals 60 power GRASS physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP.
moves.description: The user strikes the enemy with a large, fan-shaped leaf.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power GRASS physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user borrows the energy of nature, striking the enemy with force.

moves.effects: Deals 75 power GRASS physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move. Special: Deals damage and raises the user Agility.
moves.description: The user creates a sharp leaf, mowing down the target and increasing its own Agility.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 5 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user utilises a log to train hard, increasing Attack, Defence, Agility and Crit Power.

moves.effects: Deals 45 power GRASS special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user charges itself with nature's negative emotions, launching a devastating attack. For every negative effect on the user, the attack gains strength.

moves.effects: Deals 80 power FIRE special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Makes the target take increased damage. Effect duration: 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user creates a glowing ball of fire to launch at the target, causing it to take increased damage for several turns.

moves.effects: Deals 45 power FIRE physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a Fire/heat-style secondary effect.
moves.description: The user heats one of its limbs until it becomes as hot as an ember, using it to strike the enemy and decrease its Defence.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power FIRE physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a Fire/heat-style secondary effect.
moves.description: The user covers itself in flames and strikes the enemy with force.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies damage over time to the enemy side for 5 cycles.
moves.description: The user creates fire arrows and shoots them at enemies, harassing and damaging them for five turn cycles.

moves.effects: Deals 110 power FIRE special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Consumes the user energy as a self-cost while dealing damage.
moves.description: The user consumes its energy, releasing a dark flame of unparalleled heat.

moves.effects: Deals 120 power FIRE physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a Fire/heat-style secondary effect.
moves.description: The user charges itself with energy, then launches itself at the target, hitting it with enough pressure and heat to melt it.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power WATER physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user harnesses water currents to strike the enemy with force.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power WATER special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: The user sprays the target with a jet of water at very high pressure, causing damage.

moves.effects: Deals 60 power WATER physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: Deals damage and raises the user Agility.
moves.description: The user slides on a trail of water, striking the enemy and increasing its own Agility.

moves.effects: Deals 10 power WATER special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies tide damage over time to the enemy side for 5 cycles.
moves.description: The user unleashes the fury of the tides, which continues damaging all enemies for five turn cycles after the first use.

moves.effects: Deals 12 power NONE status damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 3 cycles.
moves.description: Changes to Agility are ignored for three turns, due to a psychic field that controls gravity.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally other than the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Redirects damage from the chosen ally to the user for 4 cycles.
moves.description: The user creates a shield over one of its allies, allowing the user to take damage in its place.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user creates a sea of mud at its enemies' feet, diminishing their Agility.

moves.effects: Deals 110 power GEO special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user channels an enormous amount of energy at the enemy's feet, which then explodes, causing intense damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user enters a state of meditation, achieving Enlightenment and increasing its Agility and Crit Power.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user studies a plan of action, taking into account each attack endured and returning the favour after preparing for three actions.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE.
Deals 115 power DEMON physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE.
Status move affecting one chosen battler. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Heal: restores HP to the target equal to 50% of the user's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: The user injects a healing solution that considerably reduces its Attack.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one chosen battler. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Heal: restores HP to the target equal to 50% of the user's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: The user injects a healing solution that considerably reduces its Special Attack.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user concentrates hard, increasing its Crit Power.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power ICE physical damage to one enemy. 90% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user creates an icy blade that sweeps across the target, causing intense damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies the listed self-buff and drawback effects.
moves.description: The user unleashes all its pent-up power, enhancing its attacking ability, but reducing its defences.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user surrenders its heart to feelings of fear, gaining the Horrens Attribute for three turn cycles. Once the effect ends, the user repents and is wounded.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user harnesses its psychic powers to play a trick, swapping the HP of two random Animon.

moves.effects: Deals 85 power ANOMALOUS physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user creates an energy blade that activates a chain effect once it hits the target, inflicting damage on adjacent enemies as well.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user unleashes rage accumulated during the battle, inflicting damage on the enemy proportional to the damage the user has received.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power ELECTRIC physical damage to one enemy. 90% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user accumulates a large amount of electric energy to move at lightning speed and pierce the target.

moves.effects: Deals 999999 power NONE status damage to one chosen battler. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting one ally other than the user. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Special: Transfers power: lowers the user Attack and raises the ally Attack.
moves.description: The user gathers its energy and sends it to an ally, decreasing its own Attack, but increasing that of the target.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one chosen battler. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Deals 125 power ELECTRIC special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user concentrates an infinite amount of energy in one spot, firing it in a devastating ray at the target.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Deals 90 power AURA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user harnesses sparkling winds to hit the target with force.

moves.effects: Deals 45 power DEMON special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP. Special: Hits all enemies and reduces each target SP by 2.
moves.description: The user lets out deafening shrieks, inflicting damage on all enemies and reducing their SP by two.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Heal: restores 60% of the target's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: The user carefully massages the ally, infusing it with energy and healing its wounds at the same time.

moves.effects: Deals 55 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: Damage increases on repeated use via its stacking effect.
moves.description: The user coordinates with its allies to attack the target in sequence.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies Overclock to self. Starts at 1 stack and temperature 50. Non-HP battle stats use multiplier max(0.67, (1 + 0.1 x stacks) x max(0.01, 2 - ((temperature + 273.15) / 363.15))); initial multiplier is about x1.22. Fire/Ice/Water hits adjust temperature using base +50/-40/-20 scaled by 0.3 per stack.
moves.description: The user overclocks, boosting itself enormously, but becoming more vulnerable to temperature.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power DATA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user inflicts massive damage on the enemy with digital teeth.

moves.effects: Deals 80 power ICE special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Makes the target take increased damage. Effect duration: 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user creates a sphere of ice to launch at the target, causing it to take increased damage for several turns.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power ANCIENT special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: The user summons the power of Anivis, attacking the enemy with a beam of pure energy.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power DEMON special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP. Special: Applies a Fire/heat-style secondary effect.
moves.description: The user unleashes infernal flames that damage all enemies.

moves.effects: Deals 120 power DATA special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user concentrates a stream of data and shoots it at the enemy like a laser.

moves.effects: Deals 120 power CHAKRA special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Consumes the user life energy as a self-cost while dealing damage.
moves.description: The user concentrates its life energy to attack the enemy, inflicting enormous damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user reinvigorates allies, adding 2 extra SP and enabling them to attack first on the next turn.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. For 3 cycles, healing done by the user is multiplied by x1.4 (+40%). No direct HP restoration.
moves.description: The user concentrates natural energy, enhancing the healing it provides.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power AURA physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user slashes the target and surrounding enemies with blades of wind, inflicting massive damage.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 90% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user creates a blade of energy and launches it at the enemy.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user charges itself with Anivis, increasing its Attack and Defence considerably.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power ANCIENT physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user summons the power of Anivis, attacking the enemy with a blade of pure energy.

moves.effects: Deals 80 power GRASS special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Heal: restores HP to the user equal to 50% of damage dealt.
moves.description: The user absorbs nutrients from the target, regaining part of the damage inflicted as HP.

moves.effects: Deals 120 power GRASS special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user harnesses the power of the sun, firing it in a ray at the target.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text. Effect duration: 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user scatters spores around the field that reduce the target's Agility, if it does not attack the user.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: The user glows intensely, reducing the Agility of all enemies.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user charges itself with Anivis, increasing its Special Attack and Special Defence considerably.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user charges itself with Anivis, increasing its Attack, Special Attack and Agility.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a protective/reflective effect. Effect duration: 2 cycles.
moves.description: The user creates a barrier of Anivis that evenly distributes damage received.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user creates a slide of ice, using it to consume 3 SP less during its next action.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies its listed carrier effect for 1 cycle.
moves.description: The user infects the target, forcing it to attack one of its allies during its next turn.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: For 3 cycles, draws enemy attacks while the affected targets take reduced damage.
moves.description: The user generates a huge magnetic wave, using it to attract all enemy attacks onto itself. However, targets also receive less damage for three turn cycles.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies taunt/target-control for 1 cycle.
moves.description: The user channels Anivis energy to provoke the target's soul, forcing it to attack the user again with the last skill it used.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Redirects or manipulates the target next attack.
moves.description: The user confuses the target so it strikes both an enemy and an ally with its next attack.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Heal: restores 20% of the user's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.

moves.description: The user utilises fire to pierce the target with a scorching attack.

moves.effects: Deals 75 power FIRE special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP.
moves.description: The user generates a very hot explosion that damages all enemies.

moves.effects: Deals 85 power WATER special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: The user controls water currents, creating a whirlpool that inflicts massive damage.

moves.effects: Deals 65 power WATER special damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user creates a water bomb that explodes on contact with the target, and also damages adjacent enemies.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power WATER physical damage to one enemy. 90% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user harnesses surging torrential currents, striking the enemy with enormous force.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Heal: selected ally restores HP equal to 40% of the user's Max HP; user restores 20% of the user's Max HP.
moves.description: The user channels water energy, healing itself and the target.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power WATER special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP.
moves.description: The user unleashes torrential rain. The sharp raindrops inflict damage on all enemies.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Lowers target Attack and Agility.
moves.description: The target suffers from congestion, decreasing its Attack and Agility.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text. Effect duration: 2 cycles.
moves.description: The user utilises sweet water to remove negative effects and boost the target's damage.

moves.effects: Deals 50 power WATER special damage to one enemy. 75% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user unleashes a spring of effervescent water, which always lands a critical hit.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power ANOMALOUS physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user summons the power of the spirits, striking the enemy with force.

moves.effects: Deals 120 power ANOMALOUS special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user concentrates its psychic powers, launching them at the enemy in a powerful beam.

moves.description: The user unleashes a psychic wave that attacks the target, temporarily confusing it and increasing the cost of its next action.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 15% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user attacks the target with an ectoplasmic substance that can knock it out in a single blow if it hits.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies Trance to the user for 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user enters a state of deep meditation for three turn cycles, after which all of its stats are greatly increased.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user harnesses its psychic powers to steal stat changes from the target.

moves.effects: Deals 80 power ELECTRIC special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Makes the target take increased damage. Effect duration: 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user creates a ball of ultra-high-voltage energy to launch at the target, causing it to take increased damage for several turns.

moves.effects: Deals 75 power ICE special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP.
moves.description: The user unleashes a blizzard that strikes all enemies.

moves.effects: Deals 60 power ICE physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user attacks by moving snow. The power is doubled if an Ice-type skill was used immediately beforehand.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power ICE physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user creates a huge icy boulder, using it to powerfully strike the enemy.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 10% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a freezing HP-change effect to the target.
moves.description: The user unleashes a terrible cold that can knock out the enemy in a single blow if it hits.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power ICE special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: The user concentrates icy energy in one spot, then controls and launches it at the target, causing damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a protective/reflective effect.
moves.description: The user creates an icy mirror that reflects damage received until it breaks.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: For 3 cycles, coats the user in acid and applies its listed contact/poison effect.
moves.description: The user covers itself in acid, becoming immune to negative effects for three turn cycles.

moves.effects: Deals 60 power VIRUS physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a Virus/poison-style secondary effect.
moves.description: The user attacks the enemy with a bacterial substance that increases in power if the enemy has negative statuses.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one chosen battler. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies its listed mental/status effect to the target.
moves.description: The user infects the target with a passive mindset, replacing one of the Animon's skills with Brain Rot. Can only be used once on an Animon.

moves.effects: Deals 150 power VIRUS special damage to one enemy. 70% accuracy; costs 4 SP. Special: Applies a Virus/poison-style secondary effect.
moves.description: The user produces toxic radioactive waste and launches it at the target, generating an explosion.

moves.effects: Deals 15 power VIRUS special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 1 cycle.
moves.description: The user sprays a viral substance on the target, which then infects its allies. An Animon cannot be affected by this more than once per battle.

moves.effects: Deals 120 power VIRUS special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user concentrates venomous energy in a single point, then launches it in a ray at the target.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power GEO physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user hits the ground hard, causing a chained rupture that damages the target. The power changes depending on where the skill is used.

moves.effects: Deals 85 power GEO physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user creates a spear of pure diamond and strikes the target, inflicting massive damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies damage over time to the enemy side for 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user hits the ground and sends fragments into the air that rain down on enemies, inflicting damage for three turn cycles.

moves.effects: Deals 75 power GEO special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a Fire/heat-style secondary effect.
moves.description: The user fires a jet of mud at the enemy, causing damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user sharpens its exterior, increasing its Attack considerably.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: For 5 cycles, user takes reduced physical damage and increased special damage.
moves.description: The user generates a breeze, lifting itself into the air for five turn cycles. During this time, physical skills inflict less damage on the user, while special skills inflict more.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user harnesses sparkling winds to fill the field with energy particles, increasing the power of special skills for the rest of the battle.

moves.effects: Deals 120 power AURA special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP.
moves.description: The user channels a bright beam of light and strikes the enemy with it, causing powerful damage.

moves.effects: Deals 55 power AURA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a protective/reflective effect.
moves.description: The user hits the target with a sharp wind, breaking its shields.

moves.effects: Deals 45 power AURA special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Deals damage and lowers target Agility.
moves.description: The user covers the target with a strong glow, causing damage and reducing its Agility.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power ELECTRIC special damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Targets the selected enemy plus adjacent enemies and causes recoil to the user.
moves.description: The user combines its energy with electric energy, striking the target and adjacent enemies. The user suffers recoil from the attack.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Heal: restores 50% of the target's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: The user heals the target considerably with a powerful energy charge.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: For 4 cycles, damages enemies that hit the user.
moves.description: The user charges itself with electricity and creates a cloak of sparks, damaging any enemies that touch it.

moves.effects: Deals 30 power ELECTRIC physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: The user strikes the enemy with a short but intense electric shock, reducing its SP by 1.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user does 100 press ups in a very short time, increasing its Attack considerably.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user does 100 sit ups in a very short time, increasing its Agility considerably.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move. Special: Damage scales from the user punch/charge state, then applies its listed HP-change effect.
moves.description: The user attacks the enemy with a grave punch. If both Press Up and Sit Up have previously been used, the blow will defeat the enemy.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally other than the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user lends some of its energy to the target, adding the user's power to its next attack.

moves.effects: Deals 65 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: Strikes the enemy with precision and speed, causing damage.

moves.effects: Deals 50 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: Jump attack that damages the target. The skill's power increases if used on an enemy under the effect of Updraft.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: Strikes the enemy with a precise punch, inflicting a precision blow.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power CHAKRA special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: Gathers energy from its body and then launches it at the enemy with force, causing it to explode.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one chosen battler. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Removes active information/effects from the target.
moves.description: Deletes all information on the target, removing all stat changes.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power DATA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Heal: if the hit removes the target's Shield effect, the user restores HP equal to the removed shield's stored value.
moves.description: The user breaks the opponent's shields using a special protocol. If successful, the user is moderately healed.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a heavy DATA shield to the user; allied skills cost +1 SP while active.
moves.description: The user creates a heavy data shield that protects it against most damage, but also increases allies' skill costs by 1 SP.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user side. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a protective/reflective effect. Effect duration: 2 cycles.
moves.description: The user creates a barrier that protects against attacks of the same type as its allies for three turn cycles.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user frees up excess memory, increasing its Agility relative to the time since it last used the move.

moves.effects: Deals 30 power DATA special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Deals damage and strongly lowers target Agility.
moves.description: The target suffers significant slowdown, decreasing its Agility considerably.

moves.effects: Deals 120 power DATA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user pesters the target with attacks, preventing it from reacting.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Heal: restores 100% of the target's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: The user generates a corrective patch that completely cures the target.

moves.effects: Deals 71 power DATA special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP.
moves.description: The user emits a wave of glitching data that strikes all enemies.

moves.effects: Deals 80 power DEMON physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user charges up with negative energy, delivering a deadly blow with a high chance of landing a critical hit.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: The user locks onto the targets with a terrifying glare, lowering their attack.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user corrupts the target, causing it to attack its allies. The higher the target's affection for its ally, the greater the damage.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power DEMON physical damage to one enemy. 90% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user generates a blade of negative energy, striking the target in a frenzy.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power DEMON special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: The user generates a sphere of negative energy and launches it at the target, inflicting massive damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 5 SP. Special: Applies recurring damage to the target for the rest of battle.
moves.description: The user unleashes a curse on its enemies, inflicting damage every turn cycle for the rest of the battle.

moves.effects: Deals 140 power ANCIENT physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: The user harnesses Anivis, unleashing untold destructive power.

moves.effects: Deals 140 power ANCIENT special damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP.
moves.description: The user harnesses Anivis, summoning meteors to destroy the target.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: If the user is in trouble, applies a self stat increase.
moves.description: If the user is in trouble, it gains the ability to concentrate and absorb Anivis around it, boosting all stats considerably.

moves.effects: Deals 80 power ANCIENT special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Deals damage and raises the user Agility.
moves.description: The user launches a vortex of Anivis at the target, increasing its own Agility as well.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies Director to the user for 3 cycles.
moves.description: The user prepares the scene of the battle, increasing allies' SP by 1 for the next three turn cycles.

moves.effects: Deals 85 power NONE special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP.
moves.description: The user concentrates energy, generating an explosion that damages all enemies.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 25% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Attempts to roll/apply one of several random outcomes.
moves.description: The user tries to concentrate to get an idea. If it succeeds, all stats are increased.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Deals 20 power NONE status damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 1 cycle.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a protective/reflective effect.
moves.description: The user puts a shield over the target, protecting it from damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user removes active effects from the battlefield.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: For 1 cycle, redirects the target next attack.
moves.description: The user attracts the target's next attack onto itself.

moves.effects: Deals 60 power WATER physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: Deals damage and raises the user Agility.
Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a field/domain-style effect for the user side.
moves.description: The user harnesses its psychic powers to create a dimension where Anomalous-type skills are boosted, and Chakra-type skills are weakened.

moves.effects: Deals 30 power FIRE special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user creates fiery missiles that shoot at all its opponents.

moves.effects: Deals 75 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user concentrates all its energy into one finger and attacks, using it like a spear.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies an Anivis field effect and its listed secondary effect.
moves.description: The user concentrates Anivis from its surroundings to create an incredibly powerful shield.

moves.effects: Deals 40 power ELECTRIC physical damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: The user charges itself up with electric energy to attack all its opponents. If the skill hits, the user's Agility increases. If it fails, changes to the user's Agility are reversed and this stat is reduced by one.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: The user accumulates corrosive acid, which it throws at its enemies, removing all their buffs.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power DATA special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP. Special: Hits the target side and raises the user Defence.
moves.description: The user analyses its opponents' cognitive processes and corrupts them, inflicting damage and increasing its own defence.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: For 4 cycles, creates an electric field that damages battlers present or entering battle and boosts Electric moves.
moves.description: The user harnesses friction to generate a field of static electricity, which inflicts damage on all the Animon in battle and any that enter the field. It also boosts Electric-type skills.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: The user utilises its appearance and boosts its own aura to intimidate the opponent, weakening it.

moves.effects: Deals 140 power FIRE status damage to all battlers. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: Hits all battlers with 140 power and includes a self-hit/recoil component.

quirks.description: The Animon acts later in the turn cycle, but has 1 more SP.
quirks.effectDetails: Adds +1 SP while causing the Animon to act later.

quirks.description: Boosts the Animon's stats if an Animon with Cathode is also in battle.
quirks.effectDetails: With a Cathode ally in battle: Attack, Defence, Sp. Attack, Sp. Defence, and Agility x1.2 (+20%).
Adds +1 team SP. Agility scales with active debuffs: x1.1 with 1, x1.3 with 2, x1.7 with 3, and x2.0 with 4+ debuffs. Also increases affected skill cost by +1 SP.

quirks.description: The Animon can only be hit by direct attacks, but cannot be healed.
quirks.effectDetails: Only direct attacks can hit this Animon; healing received is blocked (healing x0).

quirks.description: The Animon is not damaged by recoil.
quirks.effectDetails: Recoil damage is reduced to 0.

quirks.description: Boosts the Animon's stats if an Animon with Anode is also in battle.
quirks.effectDetails: With an Anode ally in battle: Attack, Defence, Sp. Attack, Sp. Defence, and Agility x1.2 (+20%).

quirks.description: Increases the damage inflicted by the Animon, but it is damaged slightly each time.
quirks.effectDetails: User attacks deal x1.2 damage (+20%); the user takes 4 recoil damage after attacking.

quirks.description: When the Animon attacks, there is a chance for all negative effects to be removed.
quirks.effectDetails: 15% chance after attacking to remove all negative effects from the user.

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Virus-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains a Virus weakness.

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Demon-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains a Demon weakness.

quirks.description: When Knequital is in trouble, it draws swords and grows stronger.
quirks.effectDetails: When HP falls below 50%, switches to its sword form.

quirks.description: Increases the Animon's Accuracy during battle.
quirks.effectDetails: User move accuracy x1.2 (+20%).

quirks.description: The Animon's attacks always hit, but attacks against it never miss.
quirks.effectDetails: This Animon attacks with guaranteed accuracy, and attacks against this Animon also have guaranteed accuracy.

quirks.description: Protects the Animon from additional skill effects.
quirks.effectDetails: Blocks additional skill effects from applying to this Animon.

quirks.description: The Animon's attacks inflict less damage, but echo off opponents.
quirks.effectDetails: User attacks deal x0.7 damage (-30%); the attack echoes up to 3 additional times.

quirks.description: When Dualine is in trouble, it uses its tail to change into it's most powerful form.
quirks.effectDetails: When HP falls below 50%, changes into its strongest form.

quirks.description: Reduces the cost of low-power skills by 1 SP, to a minimum of 1 SP.
quirks.effectDetails: Skills with Power <= 70 cost 1 less SP, with a minimum cost of 1 SP.

quirks.description: The Animon can always escape.
quirks.effectDetails: Escape/run-away attempts are forced to succeed.

quirks.description: When the Animon's stats are modified, the damage of its next attack is increased.
quirks.effectDetails: After the user stats are modified, the next attack deals x1.3 damage (+30%).

quirks.description: Increases the damage of the Animon's next skill when hit by a Fire attack.
quirks.effectDetails: After being hit by a Fire attack, the next skill deals x1.3 damage (+30%).

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Geo-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains a Geo weakness.

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Aura-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains an Aura weakness.

quirks.description: The Animon's SP decrease by 1 in battle, but its entire team's damage increases.
quirks.effectDetails: Team damage dealt x1.15 (+15%); team SP is reduced by 1.

quirks.description: The Animon is immune to critical hits.
quirks.effectDetails: Critical hits against this Animon are blocked.

quirks.description: Increases the damage of the next attack based on healing provided to allies.
quirks.effectDetails: When this Animon heals an ally, stores the actual HP healed up to its cap; the next attack adds stored healing / 3.5 as damage, then clears the stored value.

quirks.description: Increases the damage of critical hits.
quirks.effectDetails: Critical-hit damage x1.5 (+50%).

quirks.description: The Animon can steal the opponent's held item during battle.
quirks.effectDetails: Can steal the target held item during battle.

quirks.description: Increases the damage inflicted by the Animon, but decreases the Accuracy of attacks.
quirks.effectDetails: User attacks deal x1.5 damage (+50%) and have x0.75 accuracy (-25%).

quirks.description: When Patround hits an enemy, it enters Pursuit mode until it is defeated.
quirks.effectDetails: After hitting an enemy, enters Pursuit mode until defeated.

quirks.description: Doubles Attack and Special Attack in battle.
quirks.effectDetails: Attack and Sp. Attack x2.0 (+100%).

quirks.description: All skills lose their type, but are considerably boosted.
quirks.effectDetails: User skills become typeless and deal x1.7 damage (+70%).

quirks.description: Attacks the Animon with the lowest HP at the end of its turn.
quirks.effectDetails: At end of turn, attacks the lowest-HP enemy for a 10% HP damage effect.

quirks.description: Prevents the Animon from being defeated by a single blow.
quirks.effectDetails: A would-be one-hit KO leaves the Animon at 1 HP instead.

quirks.description: The damage inflicted by Primalong increases after every attack.
quirks.effectDetails: Damage increases by +8% per attack, up to +200%.

quirks.description: The Animon has a snow sculpture that boosts its capabilities, but melts when exposed to Fire.
quirks.effectDetails: Snow sculpture state changes stats: intact state applies Attack and Defence x1.2 (+20%); melted/exposed state applies Attack and Defence x0.7 (-30%) plus Agility x1.15 (+15%). Fire attacks trigger the melted state.

quirks.description: Increases the chance of landing critical hits and activating secondary effects.
quirks.effectDetails: Critical-hit chance and secondary-effect activation chance x1.3 (+30%).

quirks.description: During the battle, Morsiver accumulates energy until it ignites and grows stronger.
quirks.effectDetails: Ignited/stronger form attacks deal x1.35 damage (+35%). Becomes Ignited after landing 3 hits.

quirks.description: Increases the damage of Chakra-type skills, and skills without a type.
quirks.effectDetails: Chakra or typeless attacks deal x1.5 damage (+50%).

quirks.description: Muribang inflates, then explodes as soon as it is hit by a contact skill.
quirks.effectDetails: After being hit by a contact attack, triggers an explosion effect.

quirks.description: The Animon cures itself and its allies when it leaves the battlefield.
quirks.effectDetails: When leaving battle, heals itself and allies for 20% of each target's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.

quirks.description: Prevents the Animon's Attack and Special Attack from being reduced.
quirks.effectDetails: Prevents Attack and Sp. Attack stat reductions.

quirks.description: When Blumester is in trouble, it changes direction and grows stronger.
quirks.effectDetails: When HP falls below 50%, switches form/direction and becomes stronger.

quirks.description: Reduces damage received and improves healing for the whole team.
quirks.effectDetails: Team incoming damage x0.9 (-10%); team healing received x1.1 (+10%).

quirks.description: When the Animon is hit by an Electric attack, its Attack and Defence are increased.
quirks.effectDetails: When hit by an Electric attack, raises Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.

quirks.description: Maximises the Animon's Attack when it takes a critical hit, but severely reduces defences.
quirks.effectDetails: After receiving a critical hit, Attack is maximized while Defence and Sp. Defence are sharply reduced.

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Electric-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains an Electric weakness.

quirks.description: When the Animon is hit, the attacking Animon's Agility is reduced.
quirks.effectDetails: When hit, lowers the attacker Agility by 1 stage.

quirks.description: When Blumester is in trouble, it reveals itself, reducing the opponent's Agility.
quirks.effectDetails: When HP falls below 50%, changes form and lowers opposing Agility.

quirks.description: Increases the Animon's SP in battle by 1.
quirks.effectDetails: Adds +1 SP.

quirks.description: When the Animon is hit, the cost of the opponent's next action increases by 1 SP.
quirks.effectDetails: After being hit, the opponent next action costs +1 SP.

quirks.description: Stacks with ally Veveso in battle, increasing its combative power
quirks.effectDetails: With 2, 3, or 4 allied Totem users: all battle stat multipliers x1.2 (+20%), x1.4 (+40%), or x1.6 (+60%).

quirks.description: Nuclheart fills any empty places in battle with puppets of toxic waste.
quirks.effectDetails: Empty ally slots are filled with toxic waste puppets.

quirks.description: Increases the damage of skills of the same type as the Animon.
quirks.effectDetails: Moves matching the user main or hidden type deal x1.5 damage (+50%).

quirks.description: When the Animon is in trouble or suffering from negative effects, its Attack increases.
quirks.effectDetails: If HP is below 50% or the user has any active debuff: Attack and Sp. Attack x1.5 (+50%).

quirks.description: When Kentaress is hit by a super effective attack, it reacts and improves by changing its weaknesses.
quirks.effectDetails: After being hit super effectively, changes weakness profile. Agility also scales with active debuffs: x1.1 with 1, x1.3 with 2, x1.7 with 3, and x2.0 with 4+ debuffs.

quirks.description: When the Animon is suffering from a negative effect, the Animon's Agility increases.
quirks.effectDetails: Agility scales with active debuffs: x1.1 with 1, x1.3 with 2, x1.7 with 3, and x2.0 with 4+ debuffs.

heldItems.description: Increases an Animon’s stats in battle if it can evolve.
heldItems.actualEffect: If the holder's current form has at least one evolution, Attack, Defence, Special Attack, Special Defence, and Agility are multiplied by 1.2, increasing them by 20%. HP is not boosted.

heldItems.description: A special band that doubles the holder’s stat changes.
heldItems.actualEffect: Doubles the attempted stat-stage change amount affecting the holder.

heldItems.description: A magical-looking hourglass. When the Animon attacks, there’s a chance the action cost is reset to zero.
heldItems.actualEffect: When the holder pays action/SP cost, has a 15% chance to set the final cost multiplier to 0, making that cost 0.

heldItems.description: An item that increases the holder's Special Attack, but prevents the Animon from leaving the field after entering the battle.
heldItems.actualEffect: Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5, increasing it by 50%. The holder cannot switch out while the item effect is active.

heldItems.description: Mystical card that increases the damage of Fire-type attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: Fire-type move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.15, increasing it by 15%.

heldItems.description: Mystical card that increases the damage of Electric-type attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: Electric-type move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.15, increasing it by 15%.

heldItems.description: Item that enhances the effect of the holder's attribute trait.
heldItems.actualEffect: When the holder uses its attribute trait, adds to EmoTypeFlatBuff: SEREUM +16.66667, FELICIS +0.15, FUROR +0.15, HORRENS +0.08, MESTUS +0.05.

heldItems.description: Item that replenishes the holder’s HP after every action.
heldItems.actualEffect: After each holder action, heals the holder for 8 HP.

heldItems.description: Mystical card that increases the damage of Ice-type attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: Ice-type move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.15, increasing it by 15%.

heldItems.description: Durable jacket that reduces damage received.
heldItems.actualEffect: Incoming damage to the holder is multiplied by 0.7, reducing it by 30%. The holder's move cost is increased by 1.

heldItems.description: A very high-tech device that can generate electromagnetic fields. Creates a protective shield as soon as the holder enters the field.
heldItems.actualEffect: When the holder enters the field, applies a ShieldEffect to the holder if one from this item is not already present. ShieldStrength is 30 and Mitigation is 100, so it blocks up to 30 damage at full mitigation before being depleted.

heldItems.description: Mystical card that increases the damage of Anomalous-type attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: Anomalous-type move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.15, increasing it by 15%.

heldItems.description: A very heavy lead glove that enhances an Animon’s attacking abilities.
heldItems.actualEffect: Outgoing damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.35, increasing it by 35%. The holder's move cost is increased by 1.

heldItems.description: An item that increases the holder's Attack, but prevents the Animon from leaving the field after entering the battle.
heldItems.actualEffect: Attack is multiplied by 1.5, increasing it by 50%. The holder cannot switch out while the item effect is active.

heldItems.description: A special chain that inspires the holder to turn single-target attacks into a chain of attacks on adjacent targets, at the expense of any effects.
heldItems.actualEffect: For damaging moves with power greater than 0, changes the move to AOEType 3 so it chains to adjacent targets, and removes all additional move effects.

heldItems.description: A special bandage that enhances the holder's ability to heal other Animon.
heldItems.actualEffect: Healing caused by the holder is multiplied by 1.25, increasing healing by 25%.

heldItems.description: A generic manual explaining how to best use certain skills. Increases the power of typeless skills.
heldItems.actualEffect: Typeless/NONE move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.25, increasing it by 25%.

heldItems.description: Can lower the Defence and Special Defence by one level when the holder attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: On the holder's attack against another battler, has a 10% chance to lower the target's Defence by 1 stage and Special Defence by 1 stage.
